creator: oliver@FreeBSD.org
text:
During the moving of horde3 to horde3-* ports, and horde4-* to horde-*
	ports, MOVED entries where created.
	It is wrong to create MOVED entries for the ports which are still existing:

deskutils/horde-kronolith|deskutils/horde3-kronolith|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
deskutils/horde-mnemo|deskutils/horde3-mnemo|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
deskutils/horde-nag|deskutils/horde3-nag|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
devel/horde-whups|devel/horde3-whups|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
ftp/horde-gollem|ftp/horde3-gollem|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
mail/horde-imp|mail/horde3-imp|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
mail/horde-ingo|mail/horde3-ingo|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
mail/horde-turba|mail/horde3-turba|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
www/horde-ansel|www/horde3-ansel|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
www/horde-base|www/horde3-base|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
www/horde-passwd|www/horde3-passwd|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps
www/horde-wicked|www/horde3-wicked|2012-12-12|Rename of old horde apps

	Those ports like mail/horde-imp are still existing, so they are not moved!
	I understand, what is meant by this MOVED entry, but it is wrong for still
	exiting ports and confuses the utilities which are checking version number
	of existing ports:

# portversion -v "horde*"
horde-5.0.2                 >  succeeds port (port has 3.3.13_1) (=> 'www/horde3-base')
horde-content-2.0.1         =  up-to-date with port
horde-gollem-3.0.0.r1       >  succeeds port (port has 1.1.2_2) (=> 'ftp/horde3-gollem')
horde-imp-6.0.3             <  needs updating (port has 4.3.11_1,1) (=> 'mail/horde3-imp')
horde-ingo-3.0.2            <  needs updating (port has 1.2.6_1,1) (=> 'mail/horde3-ingo')
horde-kronolith-4.0.3       <  needs updating (port has 2.3.6_1,1) (=> 'deskutils/horde3-kronolith')
horde-timeobjects-2.0.2     =  up-to-date with port
horde-turba-4.0.1           >  succeeds port (port has 2.3.6_1) (=> 'mail/horde3-turba')
#

Fix: 

remove the lines
